panels.description: Indoor temperature against the green firmware compliance band, with only the heat entry and fan/cooling entry thresholds rendered. Crop/planner provenance, dispatcher math, cfg readbacks, and padding details remain in the band traceability SQL contract.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ts AS time,
    avg(temp_avg) OVER (ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN 14 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS "Indoor Temp"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND ts <= now() AND temp_avg IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

(SELECT ts AS time, outdoor_temp_f AS "Outdoor Forecast"
 FROM climate WHERE outdoor_temp_f IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1)
UNION ALL
(SELECT DISTINCT ON (date_trunc('hour', ts))
     date_trunc('hour', ts) AS time,
     temp_f::float AS "Outdoor Forecast"
 FROM weather_forecast
 WHERE ts > now() AND ts < now() + interval '72 hours'
 ORDER BY date_trunc('hour', ts), fetched_at DESC)
ORDER BY time

SELECT ts AS time,
    projected_temp_low::float AS "Compliant Low",
    projected_temp_high::float AS "Compliant High"
FROM fn_band_timeline($__timeFrom(), $__timeTo(), interval '30 minutes', 'vallery')
ORDER BY ts

SELECT ts AS time, outdoor_temp_f AS "Outdoor"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND ts <= now() AND outdoor_temp_f IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 58 ELSE NULL END AS "Heat 1" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='heat1' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 56 ELSE NULL END AS "Heat 2 (gas)" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='heat2' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 82 ELSE NULL END AS "Fan 1" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='fan1' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 84 ELSE NULL END AS "Fan 2" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='fan2' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 86 ELSE NULL END AS "Fog" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='fog' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 58 ELSE NULL END AS "Heat 1 (Electric)" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='heat1' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 56 ELSE NULL END AS "Heat 2 (Gas)" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='heat2' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Temperature Compliance Band

panels.description: Indoor VPD against the green firmware compliance band, with only the dehumidify/fan entry and fog entry thresholds rendered. Crop/planner provenance, dispatcher math, cfg readbacks, and padding details remain in the band traceability SQL contract.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ts AS time,
    avg(vpd_avg) OVER (ORDER BY ts ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS "Indoor VPD"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND ts <= now() AND vpd_avg IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

(SELECT ts AS time,
     (0.6108 * EXP(17.27 * ((outdoor_temp_f-32)/1.8) / (((outdoor_temp_f-32)/1.8)+237.3)) * (1.0 - outdoor_rh_pct/100.0))::float AS "Outdoor VPD Forecast"
 FROM climate WHERE outdoor_temp_f IS NOT NULL AND outdoor_rh_pct IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1)
UNION ALL
(SELECT DISTINCT ON (date_trunc('hour', ts))
     date_trunc('hour', ts) AS time,
     vpd_kpa::float AS "Outdoor VPD Forecast"
 FROM weather_forecast
 WHERE ts > now() AND ts < now() + interval '72 hours'
 ORDER BY date_trunc('hour', ts), fetched_at DESC)
ORDER BY time

SELECT ts AS time,
    projected_vpd_low::float AS "Compliant Low",
    projected_vpd_high::float AS "Compliant High"
FROM fn_band_timeline($__timeFrom(), $__timeTo(), interval '30 minutes', 'vallery')
ORDER BY ts

SELECT ts AS time,
    (0.6108 * EXP(17.27 * ((outdoor_temp_f-32)/1.8) / (((outdoor_temp_f-32)/1.8)+237.3)) * (1.0 - outdoor_rh_pct/100.0))::float AS "Outdoor VPD"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND ts <= now() AND outdoor_temp_f IS NOT NULL AND outdoor_rh_pct IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 1.8 ELSE NULL END AS "Mister South" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='mister_south' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 1.9 ELSE NULL END AS "Mister West" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='mister_west' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 2.0 ELSE NULL END AS "Mister Center" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='mister_center' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), CASE WHEN state THEN 2.1 ELSE NULL END AS "Fog" FROM equipment_state WHERE equipment='fog' AND $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts

panels.title: VPD Compliance Band

panels.description: Shows temperature conditions for the greenhouse.

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, temp_avg AS "Temp" FROM v_greenhouse_now

panels.title: Indoor Avg Temp
$/Day (30-Day Average)

targets.rawSql: SELECT now() AS time, ROUND(AVG(cost_total)::numeric, 2) AS v FROM daily_summary WHERE date >= current_date - interval '30 days' AND date < current_date AND cost_total > 0

panels.description: Average daily total cost across the last 30 completed daily summaries.
Observed outdoor solar radiation plus the latest forecast. Zero at night is expected; the trend shows the solar heat load that drives greenhouse temperature and resource timing.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time_bucket('15 minutes', ts) AS time, round(avg(solar_irradiance_w_m2)::numeric, 0) AS "Observed Solar W/m²"
FROM climate
WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND ts <= now() AND solar_irradiance_w_m2 IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT ts AS time, round(solar_w_m2::numeric, 0) AS "Forecast Solar W/m²"
FROM weather_forecast
WHERE fetched_at = (SELECT max(fetched_at) FROM weather_forecast)
  AND $__timeFilter(ts) AND solar_w_m2 IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Solar Irradiance Over Time
Est. kWh/day (30-Day Avg)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT now() AS time,
  ROUND(AVG(kwh_estimated)::numeric, 2) AS v
FROM daily_summary
WHERE date >= current_date - interval '30 days'
  AND date < current_date
  AND kwh_estimated IS NOT NULL

panels.description: Average estimated electric use per completed day across the last 30 days, computed from equipment runtimes and rated/observed wattages.

panels.title: Therms/day (30-Day Avg)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT now() AS time,
  ROUND(AVG(therms_estimated)::numeric, 2) AS v
FROM daily_summary
WHERE date >= current_date - interval '30 days'
  AND date < current_date
  AND therms_estimated IS NOT NULL

panels.description: Average estimated gas furnace consumption per completed day across the last 30 days.

panels.title: Water gal/day (30-Day Avg)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT now() AS time,
  ROUND(AVG(water_used_gal)::numeric, 0) AS v
FROM daily_summary
WHERE date >= current_date - interval '30 days'
  AND date < current_date
  AND water_used_gal IS NOT NULL

panels.description: Average water use per completed day across the last 30 days.
Latest controller, mister, fan, occupancy, and override state values with 24-hour change counts.

targets.rawSql:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (entity)
    entity,
    REPLACE(REPLACE(value, chr(160), ' '), '→', 'to ') AS value,
    ts
  FROM system_state
  WHERE ts >= now() - interval '24 hours'
    AND entity IN (
      'greenhouse_state', 'mode_reason', 'mister_state', 'mister_zone',
      'lead_fan', 'overrides_active', 'occupancy', 'last_transition'
    )
  ORDER BY entity, ts DESC
), changes AS (
  SELECT entity,
         COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE prev_value IS NULL OR value IS DISTINCT FROM prev_value) AS changes_24h
  FROM (
    SELECT entity, value,
           LAG(value) OVER (PARTITION BY entity ORDER BY ts) AS prev_value
    FROM system_state
    WHERE ts >= now() - interval '24 hours'
      AND entity IN (
        'greenhouse_state', 'mode_reason', 'mister_state', 'mister_zone',
        'lead_fan', 'overrides_active', 'occupancy', 'last_transition'
      )
  ) s
  GROUP BY entity
)
SELECT
  CASE l.entity
    WHEN 'greenhouse_state' THEN 'Controller state'
    WHEN 'mode_reason' THEN 'Mode reason'
    WHEN 'mister_state' THEN 'Mister state'
    WHEN 'mister_zone' THEN 'Active mist zone'
    WHEN 'lead_fan' THEN 'Lead fan'
    WHEN 'overrides_active' THEN 'Overrides'
    WHEN 'occupancy' THEN 'Occupancy'
    WHEN 'last_transition' THEN 'Last transition'
    ELSE l.entity
  END AS "Signal",
  l.value AS "Current value",
  to_char(l.ts AT TIME ZONE 'America/Denver', 'MM/DD HH24:MI') AS "Updated MDT",
  COALESCE(c.changes_24h, 0) AS "24h changes"
FROM latest l
LEFT JOIN changes c USING (entity)
ORDER BY array_position(ARRAY[
  'greenhouse_state', 'mode_reason', 'last_transition', 'mister_state',
  'mister_zone', 'lead_fan', 'overrides_active', 'occupancy'
]::text[], l.entity);

panels.title: Controller State Table (24h)

panels.description: Solid = Tempest observed. Dashed = Open-Meteo forecast. Includes feels-like and dew point.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), outdoor_temp_f AS "Observed" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND outdoor_temp_f IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts) $__time(ts), temp_f AS "Forecast" FROM weather_forecast WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts, fetched_at DESC
SELECT $__time(ts), feels_like_f AS "Feels Like" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND feels_like_f IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), dew_point AS "Dew Point" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND dew_point IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT $__time(ts), wet_bulb_temp_f AS "Wet Bulb" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND wet_bulb_temp_f IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Indoor vs Outdoor Temperature

panels.description: Shows humidity behavior over time for this part of the greenhouse system.

targets.rawSql: SELECT $__time(ts), outdoor_rh_pct AS "Observed RH" FROM climate WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) AND outdoor_rh_pct IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ts
SELECT DISTINCT ON (ts) $__time(ts), rh_pct AS "Forecast RH" FROM weather_forecast WHERE $__timeFilter(ts) ORDER BY ts, fetched_at DESC

panels.title: Indoor vs Outdoor Humidity

panels.description: VPD intensity by hour of day across dates. Dark = high VPD stress.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  date_trunc('hour', ts) AS time,
  ROUND(AVG(vpd_avg)::numeric, 2) AS "VPD"
FROM climate
WHERE ts > now() - interval '14 days' AND vpd_avg IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: VPD Heatmap (Hour × Day)

panels.description: Direct temperature comparison for the three most important growing zones.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, temp_south AS "South Temp" FROM climate WHERE ts > now() - interval '7 days' ORDER BY 1
SELECT ts AS time, temp_east AS "East Temp" FROM climate WHERE ts > now() - interval '7 days' ORDER BY 1
SELECT ts AS time, temp_west AS "West Temp" FROM climate WHERE ts > now() - interval '7 days' ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Zone Temperature Comparison

panels.description: Direct VPD comparison for the three main growing zones.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ts AS time, vpd_south AS "South VPD" FROM climate WHERE ts > now() - interval '7 days' ORDER BY 1
SELECT ts AS time, vpd_east AS "East VPD" FROM climate WHERE ts > now() - interval '7 days' ORDER BY 1
SELECT ts AS time, vpd_west AS "West VPD" FROM climate WHERE ts > now() - interval '7 days' ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Zone VPD Comparison
Equipment Energy by Device (30d)
panels.description: Thirty-day runtime, estimated electric kWh or gas therms, and estimated cost by controllable climate device.

targets.rawSql:
WITH d AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM daily_summary
  WHERE date >= current_date - interval '30 days'
    AND date < current_date
), e AS (
  SELECT equipment, wattage, btu_rating
  FROM equipment_assets
), loads AS (
  SELECT
    'Heat 1 electric'::text AS device,
    COALESCE(SUM(d.runtime_heat1_min), 0) / 60.0 AS runtime_h,
    COALESCE(SUM(d.runtime_heat1_min), 0) / 60.0 * COALESCE((SELECT wattage FROM e WHERE equipment = 'heat1'), 1500) / 1000.0 AS energy,
    'kWh'::text AS unit,
    COALESCE(SUM(d.runtime_heat1_min), 0) / 60.0 * COALESCE((SELECT wattage FROM e WHERE equipment = 'heat1'), 1500) / 1000.0 * 0.111 AS cost_usd
  FROM d
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'Heat 2 gas furnace',
    COALESCE(SUM(d.runtime_heat2_min), 0) / 60.0,
    COALESCE(SUM(d.runtime_heat2_min), 0) / 60.0 * COALESCE((SELECT btu_rating FROM e WHERE equipment = 'heat2'), 75000) / 100000.0,
    'therms',
    COALESCE(SUM(d.runtime_heat2_min), 0) / 60.0 * COALESCE((SELECT btu_rating FROM e WHERE equipment = 'heat2'), 75000) / 100000.0 * 0.83
  FROM d
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'Fogger',
    COALESCE(SUM(d.runtime_fog_min), 0) / 60.0,
    COALESCE(SUM(d.runtime_fog_min), 0) / 60.0 * COALESCE((SELECT wattage FROM e WHERE equipment = 'fog'), 800) / 1000.0,
    'kWh',
    COALESCE(SUM(d.runtime_fog_min), 0) / 60.0 * COALESCE((SELECT wattage FROM e WHERE equipment = 'fog'), 800) / 1000.0 * 0.111
  FROM d
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'Fans',
    (COALESCE(SUM(d.runtime_fan1_min), 0) + COALESCE(SUM(d.runtime_fan2_min), 0)) / 60.0,
    COALESCE(SUM(d.runtime_fan1_min), 0) / 60.0 * COALESCE((SELECT wattage FROM e WHERE equipment = 'fan1'), 52) / 1000.0 +
      COALESCE(SUM(d.runtime_fan2_min), 0) / 60.0 * COALESCE((SELECT wattage FROM e WHERE equipment = 'fan2'), 52) / 1000.0,
    'kWh',
    (COALESCE(SUM(d.runtime_fan1_min), 0) / 60.0 * COALESCE((SELECT wattage FROM e WHERE equipment = 'fan1'), 52) / 1000.0 +
      COALESCE(SUM(d.runtime_fan2_min), 0) / 60.0 * COALESCE((SELECT wattage FROM e WHERE equipment = 'fan2'), 52) / 1000.0) * 0.111
  FROM d
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'Vent actuator',
    COALESCE(SUM(d.runtime_vent_min), 0) / 60.0,
    COALESCE(SUM(d.runtime_vent_min), 0) / 60.0 * COALESCE((SELECT wattage FROM e WHERE equipment = 'vent'), 10) / 1000.0,
    'kWh',
    COALESCE(SUM(d.runtime_vent_min), 0) / 60.0 * COALESCE((SELECT wattage FROM e WHERE equipment = 'vent'), 10) / 1000.0 * 0.111
  FROM d
  UNION ALL
  SELECT
    'Grow lights',
    COALESCE(SUM(d.runtime_grow_light_min), 0) / 60.0,
    COALESCE(SUM(d.runtime_grow_light_min), 0) / 60.0 * (
      COALESCE((SELECT wattage FROM e WHERE equipment = 'grow_light_grow'), 816) +
      COALESCE((SELECT wattage FROM e WHERE equipment = 'grow_light_main'), 630)
    ) / 1000.0,
    'kWh',
    COALESCE(SUM(d.runtime_grow_light_min), 0) / 60.0 * (
      COALESCE((SELECT wattage FROM e WHERE equipment = 'grow_light_grow'), 816) +
      COALESCE((SELECT wattage FROM e WHERE equipment = 'grow_light_main'), 630)
    ) / 1000.0 * 0.111
  FROM d
)
SELECT
  device AS "Device",
  ROUND(runtime_h::numeric, 1) AS "Runtime h",
  ROUND(energy::numeric, 1) AS "Energy",
  unit AS "Unit",
  ROUND(cost_usd::numeric, 2) AS "Est. cost"
FROM loads
WHERE runtime_h > 0 OR energy > 0
ORDER BY cost_usd DESC;
